_meta.topics_source: U.S. Census Bureau ACS Subject Definitions
_meta.note: Identifier and weight fields have no `topic` key; analytical variables are mapped to Census ACS topic names. SAME_SEX is the only derived field; see METHODOLOGY.md for the derivation policy. Replicate weights PWGTP1..PWGTP{n_replicate_weights} are not enumerated here; they are derived in pums_fields.py from the count.

person_vars.name: ST
person_vars.description: state FIPS (always 06 in this project, kept for parity)

person_vars.name: PWGTP
person_vars.description: person weight (main estimate; integer count of real people the record represents)

person_vars.name: SERIALNO
person_vars.description: household serial, join key to housing record

person_vars.name: RAC1P
person_vars.description: race recoded major (1 white, 2 Black, 6 Asian, ...)

person_vars.name: RACAIAN
person_vars.description: multi-race flag: any American Indian / Alaska Native (1 yes, 0 no)

person_vars.name: RACBLK
person_vars.description: multi-race flag: any Black / African American

person_vars.name: RACNHPI
person_vars.description: multi-race flag: any Native Hawaiian / Pacific Islander

person_vars.name: HISP
person_vars.description: Hispanic origin (1 not Hispanic, 2-24 specific origins)

person_vars.name: CIT
person_vars.description: citizenship status (1-4 native, 5 naturalized, 6 not citizen)

person_vars.name: YOEP
person_vars.description: year of entry to US (for non-native-born)

person_vars.name: SCH
person_vars.description: current school enrollment (1 not enrolled, 2 public, 3 private)

person_vars.name: LANP
person_vars.topic: Language Spoken at Home and Ability to Speak English
person_vars.description: specific language at home (1200 Spanish, 2050 Vietnamese, etc.)

person_vars.name: LANX
person_vars.topic: Language Spoken at Home and Ability to Speak English
person_vars.description: speaks non-English at home (1 yes, 2 no)

person_vars.name: ENG
person_vars.topic: Language Spoken at Home and Ability to Speak English
person_vars.description: English proficiency (1 very well .. 4 not at all)

person_vars.name: MAR
person_vars.description: marital status (1 married, 2 widowed, 3 divorced, 4 separated, 5 never married)

person_vars.name: MARHYP
person_vars.description: year last married (4-digit; for newlywed signal)

person_vars.name: MARHD
person_vars.description: divorced in past 12 months (1 yes, 2 no; acute vs. ever-divorced)

person_vars.name: MSP
person_vars.description: married, spouse present/absent recode (cleaner than MAR + RELSHIPP combo)

person_vars.name: RELSHIPP
person_vars.description: relationship to householder (used to derive SAME_SEX)

person_vars.name: FER
person_vars.description: gave birth in last 12 mo (1 yes, 2 no; women 15-50 only)

person_vars.name: PAOC
person_vars.description: presence and age of own children (1-4)

person_vars.name: GCL
person_vars.description: grandparents living with grandchildren under 18 (1 yes, 2 no)

person_vars.name: MIL
person_vars.topic: Veteran Status, Period of Military Service
person_vars.description: service status (1 active, 2 past active, 3 training only, 4 never)

person_vars.name: VPS
person_vars.topic: Veteran Status, Period of Military Service
person_vars.description: veteran period of service (Vietnam, Gulf, post-9/11, etc.; refines MIL)

person_vars.name: COW
person_vars.description: class of worker (1 private for-profit, 2 nonprofit, 3-5 gov, 6-7 self-employed)

person_vars.name: WKL
person_vars.description: when last worked (1 within 12 mo, 2 1-5 yrs, 3 5+ yrs, 4 never)

person_vars.name: INTP
person_vars.description: interest, dividend, and net rental income (wealth / passive income signal)

person_vars.name: POVPIP
person_vars.description: income-to-poverty ratio (501 max; 100 = at poverty line)

person_vars.name: MIG
person_vars.description: lived in same house 1 yr ago

person_vars.name: SAME_SEX
person_vars.description: lives in a same-sex household (derived from RELSHIPP codes 23 same-sex spouse and 24 same-sex unmarried partner); see METHODOLOGY.md for derivation policy

housing_vars.name: SERIALNO
housing_vars.description: household serial, join key to housing record

housing_vars.name: TEN
housing_vars.description: tenure (1 owned w/ mortgage, 2 owned free, 3 rented, 4 occupied w/o pmt)

housing_vars.name: HHL
housing_vars.topic: Language Spoken at Home and Ability to Speak English

housing_vars.name: HUPAOC
housing_vars.description: presence of own children (categorical with age groups)

housing_vars.name: LNGI
housing_vars.topic: Language Spoken at Home and Ability to Speak English

housing_vars.name: PARTNER
housing_vars.description: presence of unmarried partner (used to derive SAME_SEX)

housing_vars.name: R65
housing_vars.description: presence of persons 65+ in household (multigen / elder-care signal)

housing_vars.name: YRBLT
housing_vars.description: year structure built (decade-start year value: 1939 = '1939 or earlier', ..., 2020 = '2020 or later')

housing_vars.name: HFL
housing_vars.description: heating fuel (2 propane, 4 oil, 6 wood = rural signals)

housing_vars.name: GRPIP
housing_vars.description: gross rent as % of household income (renter cost burden)

housing_vars.name: OCPIP
housing_vars.description: selected monthly owner costs as % of household income (owner cost burden)

housing_vars.name: FS
housing_vars.description: food stamps received in last year

housing_vars.name: ACCESS
housing_vars.description: internet access at home (1 paid, 2 free, 3 none)
